channel.title: Kronoskogen on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Kronoskogen on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Ängelholm UFO memorial
item.description:
The Ängelholm UFO memorial in Sweden commemorates an alleged UFO landing site. It features a concrete model of a flying saucer and landing impressions, based on the account of Gösta Carlsson. Carlsson claimed a UFO encounter in 1946 led to his business success, though investigations have not corroborated his story. Despite the lack of evidence, the monument, erected in 1972, has become a tourist attraction and is maintained by the local government.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/%C3%84ngelholm_UFO_memorial
